name: Enchilada Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce by sautéing the onion and garlic in oil until the onion is softened. Discard the garlic.
2. Add the carrot, green bell pepper, bay leaf, and herbs to the pan. Stir well to combine.
3. Incorporate the tomatoes, tomato paste, and seasonings into the mixture. Simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
